creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
ATM, the port french/med is bundled with Code_Aster, as you can see in MASTER_SITES.

Its version is still 3.2.1: see
https://www.code-aster.org/V2/spip.php?article98

If you need a newer version, e.g. for Salome, it would be better to create a new port after a repocopy.

Remark: a previous version of this port was in the tree as cad/salome-med and could be resurrected. See
https://www.freshports.org/cad/salome-med/
